free_text: The 16O(alpha,p)19F reaction at Ea=40 MeV
Surface barrier detectors with detector
thicknesses of 0.5 and 5 mm were used. A separate run
was carried out using detectors of thicknesses of 2
and 5 mm out for angles < 25 degr. in order to measure
the transitions to lower excited states in 19F.
A 70 mm diameter gas cell with windows consisting
of 12 um thick Kapton foil filled with gas pressures
between 200 and 400 Torr.
EN-RSL - The energy resolution of 80-150 keV was
mainly due to kinematic effects and straggling in the
gas target.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
No information about source of uncertainty
Figs 2-6
SD: BIB updated. ANG-ERR -> ANG-ERR-D;
DATA-ERR -> ERR-DIG; DATA-ERR1 -> DATA-ERR.
Excitation energies of the states in
19F obtained from the peak fitting procedure and
calibration to known states indicates by FLAG=1
see above
Tbl.1
